feed.title: Claude Daily Briefing
feed.subtitle: Today's briefing: 15 blog posts, 7 model updates, 1 Claude Code releases, 19 desktop updates, 7 Office plugin updates, 2 Chrome extension updates, 4 tweets, 1 SDK releases, 1 community discussions. Latest: v2.1.92.

entry.title: v2.1.92
entry.summary: Added. Added interactive Bedrock setup wizard accessible from the login screen when selecting "3rd-party platform" — guides you through AWS authentication, region configuration, credential verification, and model pinning. Added per-model and cache-hit breakdown to. remote-control-session-name-prefix

entry.title: Ask HN: Anthropic changing billing for third-party harnesses for Teams Accounts?
entry.summary: HN discussion. 1 points, 0 comments.

entry.title: anthropic-sdk-python v0.89.0
Australian government and Anthropic sign MOU for AI safety and research
entry.summary: Australian government and Anthropic sign MOU for AI safety and research

entry.title: Computer use research preview in Cowork and Claude Code + Dispatch improvements
entry.summary: Computer use research preview in Cowork and Claude Code + Dispatch improvements

entry.title: Users on Pro and Max plans can give Claude access to computer use. Claude can open files, run dev tools, point, click, a...
entry.summary: Users on Pro and Max plans can give Claude access to computer use. Claude can open files, run dev tools, point, click, and navigate to what’s on your screen to perform tasks itself—with no setup required. Claude’s new computer use capability makes Dispatch even more helpful by allowing it to use you

entry.title: What 81,000 people want from AI
entry.summary: What 81,000 people want from AI

entry.title: Control Cowork from your phone with a persistent thread (research preview for Pro/Max)
entry.summary: Control Cowork from your phone with a persistent thread (research preview for Pro/Max)

entry.title: Users on Pro and Max plans can access a persistent agent thread via Claude Desktop or Claude for iOS/Android to manage t...
entry.summary: Users on Pro and Max plans can access a persistent agent thread via Claude Desktop or Claude for iOS/Android to manage tasks in Cowork. We're rolling this out to Max plans starting today, and Pro plans over the next two days. For more information, seeAssign tasks to Claude from anywhere in Cowork.

entry.title: Claude creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
entry.summary: Claude creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations

entry.title: Claude can now create custom charts, diagrams and other visualizations in-line in its responses. For more information, s...
entry.summary: Claude can now create custom charts, diagrams and other visualizations in-line in its responses. For more information, seeCustom visuals in chat.

entry.title: Anthropic invests $100 million into the Claude Partner Network
entry.summary: Anthropic invests $100 million into the Claude Partner Network

entry.title: Introducing The Anthropic Institute
entry.summary: Introducing The Anthropic Institute

entry.title: Shared context across Excel and PowerPoint add-ins
entry.summary: The Claude add-ins for Excel and PowerPoint now share a single conversation thread, eliminating repeated setup when switching between apps. Reusable Skills let teams save repeatable workflows as one-click actions. Available on Mac and Windows for all paid plans.

entry.title: Work across Excel and PowerPoint
entry.summary: Work across Excel and PowerPoint

entry.title: We’ve improved our Claude for Excel and Claude for PowerPoint add-ins. They can now share the full context of your conve...
entry.summary: We’ve improved our Claude for Excel and Claude for PowerPoint add-ins. They can now share the full context of your conversation, so every action Claude takes in one application is informed by everything that’s happened in the other. We also added support for skills in the add-ins, and the ability fo

entry.title: Use Claude for Excel and PowerPoint with an LLM gateway
entry.summary: Use Claude for Excel and PowerPoint with an LLM gateway

entry.title: Sydney will become Anthropic’s fourth office in Asia-Pacific
entry.summary: Sydney will become Anthropic’s fourth office in Asia-Pacific

entry.title: New in Claude Code: Code Review — a team of agents runs a deep review on every PR
entry.summary: New in Claude Code: Code Review. A team of agents runs a deep review on every PR. Code output per Anthropic engineer is up 200% this year and reviews were the bottleneck.

entry.title: Can confirm Claude Code is 100% written by Claude Code
entry.summary: Boris Cherny confirmed that Claude Code is now 100% written by Claude Code itself, up from roughly 80% in May 2025.

entry.title: Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security
entry.summary: Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security

entry.summary: Where things stand with the Department of War

entry.summary: Memory for free users

entry.title: Memory from chat history is now available for all Claude users, including free users. For more information, refer to the...
entry.summary: Memory from chat history is now available for all Claude users, including free users. For more information, refer to the following articles:

entry.title: Use Claude’s chat search and memory to build on previous context
entry.summary: Use Claude’s chat search and memory to build on previous context

entry.summary: Import and export your memory from Claude

entry.title: Scheduled tasks in Cowork
entry.summary: Scheduled tasks in Cowork

entry.title: We introduced the ability to create and schedule both recurring and on-demand tasks in Cowork, as well as a new Customiz...
entry.summary: We introduced the ability to create and schedule both recurring and on-demand tasks in Cowork, as well as a new Customize section in Claude Desktop that groups skills, plugins, and connectors in one place. For more information, seeSchedule recurring tasks in Cowork.

entry.title: Anthropic acquires Vercept to advance Claude's computer use capabilities
entry.summary: Anthropic acquires Vercept to advance Claude's computer use capabilities

entry.title: Anthropic’s Responsible Scaling Policy: Version 3.0
entry.summary: Anthropic’s Responsible Scaling Policy: Version 3.0

entry.title: Tips for using Claude Code, sourced directly from the Claude Code team
entry.summary: Tips for using Claude Code sourced from the team. There is no one right way to use Claude Code — everyone's setup is different.

entry.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 launch
entry.summary: Claude Sonnet 4.6 launch

entry.title: We launched our most capable Sonnet model yet, with a full upgrade of the model’s skills across coding, computer use, lo...
entry.summary: We launched our most capable Sonnet model yet, with a full upgrade of the model’s skills across coding, computer use, long-context reasoning, agent planning, knowledge work, and design. Sonnet 4.6 also features a 1M token context window in beta. Read our blog post for more information:Introducing Cl

entry.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.6
entry.summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.6

entry.title: Previously, Enterprise plans were only available to customers working with our Sales team. Now, any organization can pur...
entry.summary: Previously, Enterprise plans were only available to customers working with our Sales team. Now, any organization can purchase an Enterprise plan directly on our website with no Sales conversation required. Self-serve Enterprise plans have a single seat type that includes access to Claude, Claude Cod

entry.title: Claude Opus 4.6 launch
entry.summary: Claude Opus 4.6 launch

entry.title: We’ve upgraded our smartest model and improved its coding skills. Read our blog post for more information:Introducing Cl...
entry.summary: We’ve upgraded our smartest model and improved its coding skills. Read our blog post for more information:Introducing Claude Opus 4.6.

entry.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.6
entry.summary: Introducing Claude Opus 4.6

entry.title: Claude for PowerPoint — research preview
entry.summary: Claude for PowerPoint launches as a research preview. It reads slide masters, layouts, fonts, and color schemes to generate or revise content while maintaining brand consistency. Creates native editable charts and diagrams. Available for Max, Team, and Enterprise plans.

entry.title: How I use Claude Code — my setup might be surprisingly vanilla
entry.summary: I run 5 Claudes in parallel in my terminal. I number my tabs 1-5, and use system notifications to know when a Claude needs input. I exclusively use Opus 4.5 — it's the best coding model I've ever used.

entry.title: Claude Cowork — agentic mode for Desktop
entry.summary: Claude Cowork turns Claude into a digital coworker inside the Desktop app. It can read, edit, create, and organize files on your computer — no terminal required. Available on Pro and Max plans as a research preview.

entry.title: Claude is a space to think
entry.summary: Claude is a space to think

entry.title: Claude on Mars
entry.summary: Claude on Mars

entry.title: Claude for Excel — now available for Pro subscribers
entry.summary: Claude for Excel expands from Max/Enterprise to all Pro subscribers ($20/mo). Supports full spreadsheet functionality including pivot tables, chart modifications, and conditional formatting while keeping formulas and dependencies intact.

entry.title: Claude for Chrome now in beta for all paid plans
entry.summary: Claude in Chrome is now available to all Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise users. Features include scheduled tasks, workflow recording, multi-tab browsing, and Claude Code integration.
